drifts.description: Root element 'Condition' added with specific metadata (short and definition) in target profile.
Extension 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-chronic-disease' present in source profile is removed in target.
New extension 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-admission-diagnosis' added in target profile.
MustSupport flag set to true for new extension 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-admission-diagnosis' in target profile.
New extension 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-discharge-diagnosis' added in target profile.
MustSupport flag set to true for new extension 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-discharge-diagnosis' in target profile.
Cardinality changed from [1..*] in source to [0..*] in target, making the element optional.
Value set binding removed: 'extensible' binding to 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-category' in source, no binding in target.
Value set binding removed: 'extensible' binding to 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity' in source, no binding in target.
Definition changed from null to 'Hemas hospitals require severity documentation for triage and resource allocation.'
Element 'Condition.bodySite' removed in target profile.
Reference target profile changed from 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient' to 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient'.
Cardinality changed from [0..*] in source to [1..*] in target, making the element mandatory.
Reference target profile changed from 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter' to 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter'.
Definition changed from null to 'All Hemas conditions must be linked to an encounter for admission tracking.'
Cardinality changed from [1..*] in source to [0..*] in target, making the element optional.
Element 'Condition.abatement[x]' removed in target profile.
Cardinality changed from [0..*] in source to [1..*] in target, making the element mandatory.
Reference target profile changed from 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner' to 'https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner'.
Element 'Condition.asserter' removed in target profile.
Element 'Condition.note' removed in target profile.

Type profile constraint changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-chronic-disease] â [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-discharge-diagnosis]
MustSupport added in target
